title: AutoGG Custom
description: Sends a message after a message, we have built-in presets for server. You can send presets to be added in the mod.
body:
## AutoGG

**AutoGG** is a lightweight **Fabric mod** designed to automatically send your **“GG” (Good Game)** message when a match ends. Instead of manually typing a message after every round, AutoGG detects the end of a game and instantly sends your selected preset in chat. This makes it perfect for players who want a quick, consistent way to show sportsmanship while focusing on gameplay.

The mod is built with **simplicity and performance in mind**. It runs with minimal overhead and integrates smoothly into the Minecraft client without affecting gameplay. AutoGG focuses on doing one job well: making post-match messages automatic, customizable, and easy to manage.

---

## Key Features

### Automatic GG Messages

AutoGG detects when a match ends and automatically sends a **GG message** in chat. This saves time and ensures you never forget to acknowledge the end of a round.

### Message Presets

Create and manage a list of **GG message presets** that you can quickly switch between. For example:

* `GG`
* `gg wp`
* `ggs`
* `gg everyone`
* `gg well played`

You can add as many presets as you like and select which one AutoGG will use.

### Favorites System

Mark your most-used presets as **favorites** so they’re easier to access and select. This is especially useful if you maintain a large collection of GG messages.

### Built-In Search

AutoGG includes a **search feature** that lets you quickly find specific presets. Instead of scrolling through a long list, simply type part of the message to locate it instantly.

### Paging for Large Lists

If you have many presets, AutoGG organizes them using **paging**. This keeps the interface clean and easy to navigate, even with dozens of saved messages.

### Quick Actions

Manage presets quickly using built-in actions:

* **Add** new presets
* **Update/Edit** existing messages
* **Delete** presets you no longer want
* **Use** a preset instantly as your active GG message

These tools make managing your message list fast and convenient.

### Server Presets

AutoGG supports **server-specific presets**, allowing you to maintain different GG messages for different servers. This makes it easy to customize your messages depending on where you're playing.

### Send Server Presets

You can **send Server Presets** to the owner thats gonna look like this:

**player:** (USERNAME)

**uuid:** (UUID, for banning people from sending presets)

**server ip:** (The Server IP the server presets should work on)

**reaction:** (On what message the automatic GG message gets sent)

**message:** (The GG Message)

---

## Community Preset Submissions

If you create a preset that you think other players would enjoy, you can **send it to the mod owner**. Submitted presets may be reviewed and added as **built-in presets** in future updates of AutoGG, allowing the community to contribute to the default preset collection.

---

## Lightweight and Client-Friendly

AutoGG is intentionally designed to be:

* **Lightweight**
* **Fast**
* **Easy to configure**
* **Non-intrusive**

It does not introduce unnecessary complexity and works seamlessly with **Fabric-based Minecraft clients**.

---

## Why Use AutoGG?

AutoGG is perfect for players who:

* Want to **automatically send GG messages**
* Prefer **customizable message presets**
* Play frequently and want to **save time after matches**
* Like keeping their chat behavior **consistent and automated**

Whether you’re playing casually or competitively, AutoGG helps ensure you always end your matches with a simple **GG**.
